model.label: Kimi K2.5
model.description: Moonshot AI • Reasoning model from the Kimi family built for complex thinking tasks.

pick.rationale: Saint Mary's holds a consistent ~15-spot advantage in both KenPom and Torvik rankings with a +4.5 point edge in adjusted efficiency margin, driven by an elite defense ranked 22nd nationally compared to Texas A&M's 43rd-ranked unit. While both teams feature comparable offensive firepower, the Gaels' superior defensive metrics and significantly better record (27-5 vs 21-11) provide a reliable path to victory in this 7/10 matchup. Texas A&M's SEC pedigree creates a credible upset threat, but Saint Mary's efficiency advantages and consistently strong tournament performances tilt this toward the favorite.

reasoningStep.title: Statistical Comparison & Pick
reasoningStep.summary: Saint Mary's shows superior advanced metrics with a ~15-spot ranking advantage and +4.5 efficiency margin edge, particularly on defense where they rank 22nd nationally. The Gaels' 27-5 record and elite defensive profile provide a reliable path to victory despite Texas A&M's SEC credentials.
evidence: Saint Mary's KenPom 24th, Torvik 25th vs Texas A&M 39th in both
Efficiency margin: Saint Mary's +23.11 vs Texas A&M +18.65
Defensive rankings: Saint Mary's 22nd vs Texas A&M 43rd
Records: Saint Mary's 27-5 vs Texas A&M 21-11

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.

modelTrace.content:
The web searches are failing due to 403 errors. I'll have to work with the ratings data I have. Let me analyze what I found:

**Saint Mary's:**
- KenPom: 24th
- Torvik: 25th
- Record: 27-5
- KenPom Adj. EM: +23.11
- Offense: 43rd (120.3)
- Defense: 22nd (97.2)
- Conference: WCC

**Texas A&M:**
- KenPom: 39th
- Torvik: 39th
- Record: 21-11
- KenPom Adj. EM: +18.65
- Offense: 49th (119.7)
- Defense: 43rd (101.1)
- Conference: SEC

Saint Mary's has a clear statistical advantage:
- About 15 spots higher in rankings
- +4.46 point advantage in efficiency margin
- Significantly better defense (22nd vs 43rd)
- Similar offense rankings (43rd vs 49th)
- Better record (27-5 vs 21-11)

Texas A&M has the SEC pedigree which is typically valued higher than the WCC, but Saint Mary's has consistently been a strong tournament team with excellent defensive metrics.

This is a 7/10 matchup where Saint Mary's is the higher seed. Historically 7 seeds win about 60% of the time against 10 seeds. The advanced metrics strongly favor Saint Mary's here.

Let me make the prediction based on this data.

Based on the ratings data I was able to retrieve, I have sufficient information to make an informed prediction for this South 7/10 matchup.

**Key Findings:**

**Saint Mary's (7-seed):**
- KenPom: 24th, Torvik: 25th
- Record: 27-5
- Adj. Efficiency Margin: +23.11
- Offense: 43rd, Defense: 22nd

**Texas A&M (10-seed):**
- KenPom: 39th, Torvik: 39th
- Record: 21-11
- Adj. Efficiency Margin: +18.65
- Offense: 49th, Defense: 43rd

Saint Mary's holds a consistent ~15-spot advantage in both KenPom and Torvik rankings with a +4.5 point edge in adjusted efficiency margin. The Gaels' elite defense (22nd nationally) is their differentiating factor, while both teams feature similar offensive profiles in the 40s. Saint Mary's also enters with a significantly better record (27-5 vs 21-11).

This is a 7/10 matchup where history favors the 7-seed approximately 60% of the time. The statistical profile here favors Saint Mary's more decisively than the typical 7/10 game due to their superior defensive metrics and efficiency margin. While Texas A&M brings SEC-tested credentials, Saint Mary's WCC dominance and consistently strong tournament performances under Randy Bennett provide confidence.
